title: The College Widow
writer: George Ade, Jack Jarmuth, Peter Milne
actors: Dolores Costello, William Collier Jr., Douglas Gerrard
plot: The College Widow (1927) is an American silent comedy film produced and distributed by Warner Bros. and directed by Archie Mayo. The film is based on the 1904 Broadway play by George Ade and was previously adapted to film in 1915 ...
